meta.source: blueprince.wiki.gg/wiki/Luck: start at 10; at 29 every room grants its max additional items; 2+ items found in one room decreases luck
meta.notes: Curve shape between floor and 29 is not documented; linear is an inferred placeholder, editable here.

item_values.comment: Relative resource values used by shaped rewards and greedy policies; not game data.
